_source: MEASURED from 584 shots x their narration (app/composer_analysis.py), 5 fern videos. Replaces the hand-guessed version.
headline: fern is an EVIDENCE channel, not a reconstruction channel: mannequins are 16% of shots, and only 19% of shots literally depict the line. Answer a claim with a receipt.

opening.note: fastest cutting: montage barrage, hook before orientation

middle.note: slows down; context up to 57%; the mannequins live HERE, building a world

long_holds.note: uncut evidence deep in the middle: a call, a document, footage allowed to play

closing.note: picks back up; almost never literal; metaphor can rise as the argument generalises

our_sources.document+screenshot: playwright screenshots of PUBLIC records (court filings, DOJ/FBI, government pages) + receipts.py float-in and highlight sweep on the spoken word
our_sources.archival: app/archival.py — Wikimedia PD/CC and US government works (public domain)
our_sources.reconstruction: Wan t2v + fern LoRA, reserved for the middle and for what cannot be filmed

copyright_note: fern uses copyrighted news footage under fair-use commentary. We do NOT auto-scrape that. Safe lanes: US government works (public domain), Wikimedia PD/CC, our own screenshots of public pages for commentary.
